title: Parliamentary Tours - Olivia Bailey
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire
text_excerpt: Parliamentary Tours - Olivia Bailey Skip to main content Olivia Bailey Member of Parliament for Reading West and Mid Berkshire Join Get Involved Donate About Olivia How Olivia can help Latest news Parliamentary Tours More Menu Parliamentary Tours If you are a school seeking to book a Parliamentary Tour, please go the Education Visits page on the UK Parliament website. Parliamentary Tours Name (Required) First Last Address (Required) Street Address Address Line 2 City ZIP / Postal Code Email address Enter Email Confirm Email Phone Do we have permission to contact you on this phone number? Yes No Number of tickets required (adults) (Required) Please enter a number from 1 to 150 . Number of tickets required (children) (Required) Please enter a number from 0 to 150 . Please provide your preferred dates (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday). Preference 1: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 2: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 3: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 4: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. Preference 5: MM slash DD slash YYYY This information helps the tours team at parliament, but they are not able to guarantee a tour within these dates. What is your availability? Please tick all that apply. Tours start within the time ranges below and last 75 minutes (Required) Monday 9am - 10am Monday 10am - 12pm Tuesday 9 - 10am Tuesday 10am - 12pm Wednesday 9am - 10am Wednesday 10am - 12pm Friday 9am - 1.30pm Friday 3.30pm - 5pm Is this your first time engaging with UK Parliament? For example, visiting UK Parliament in London, contacting your MP or signing a petition on the government website. (Required) Yes No Consent I consent The information that you have provided, or will provide, to the Office of Olivia Bailey MP will only be used by Olivia Bailey and/or her staff in relation to the issue recorded above. In order to deal with this issue it may be necessary to pass your details to third parties including, but not limited to, officials and elected representatives of local and national authorities and bodies. You should read the statement below to show that you understand that your information will be used for the purpose described and that you consent to the proposed processing. If you have any questions or concerns about how your information will be processed or about your right under the Data Protection Act 2018 please contact Olivia Bailey MP. I confirm that it is my wish for Olivia Bailey MP and/or her staff to pursue the matters I have discussed with her/them. In order to do so Olivia Bailey and/or her staff may use all the information I have provided about me, whether written or spoken, and including sensitive personal information. I understand that Olivia Bailey and/or her staff will do so in accordance with the requirements of the Data Protection Act 2018. UK Parliament will use the personal information on this form to book your place(s) on a free tour of UK Parliament for UK residents. They also ask for more demographic information, which they will use anonymously to assess their performance in reaching a diverse and representative audience of the UK. For more information on how UK Parliament processes personal data, please refer to their privacy policy for the public: https://www.parliament.uk/site-information/data-protection/privacy-notices/ Olivia Bailey Further details Promoted by Reading West and Mid Berkshire CLP on behalf of Olivia Bailey, c/o 20 Rushworth Street London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
